name: Hop
description: Hop for microcontrollers: a delay-tolerant, end-to-end-encrypted mesh over BLE, LoRa, and Wi-Fi, wrapping the libhop C ABI in a small Arduino / ESP-IDF C++ class. ESP32 today, more MCUs as the cross-compiles land. Bundles the Hop protocol core (hop-core, https://github.com/hopmesh/hop-core), source-available under FSL-1.1-ALv2.
